prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing a Garrett GT3582R Gen II turbocharger (846077-5002S) with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a CSF Race intercooler (BMW G8X M3/M4 Competition, part #8221) and a VRSF chargepipe (G8X M3/M4, part #CP-G8X-1) to eliminate stock plastic failure points on the S58 engine (3.0L twin-turbo I6).

Motec M150 ECU standalone management with custom S58-specific calibration for 93 octane fuel, targeting 650whp at 22psi on E40 blend, including individual cylinder knock control, flex-fuel sensor integration, and launch control optimized for the G82's M xDrive system with a Wavetrac LSD (part #WVT-G8X) for torque vectoring.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Endurance twin-disc clutch (S58-specific, part #SDT3-6000) and a Driveshaft Shop 2.75" aluminum driveshaft (G8X M3/M4, part #DS-G8X-2.75) to handle increased torque, paired with a differential fluid cooler (Mishimoto MMOC-DIFF-G8X) to prevent heat soak in track use.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (G82-specific, part #RB-WB-G82) with carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap on the kidney grilles and a Vorsteiner V-GT rear diffuser (G82, part #V-5010-1000) for aggressive aero balance.

OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber mirror caps (part #51-16-2-493-688) and a custom Akrapović Evolution Line exhaust system (G8X M3/M4 Competition, part #EVO-BMW-G8X) with titanium tips and a valved center section for adjustable sound levels, retaining the S58's factory quad-exit design.

BC Racing BR coilovers (G82-specific, part #BR-RS-G82) with Swift Springs (8K/12K front/rear) and Ohlins Road & Track dual-flow valve dampers (G8X M3/M4, part #DFV-G8X) for track-day adjustability, paired with a set of HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x10.5 ET25 front, 20x12 ET40 rear) in Satin Black with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/30/20 front, 305/30/20 rear).
